title: Chest pain

items.final_wording: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

items.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency limitation for chest pain.

items.final_wording: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped onset, location, character, radiation, exertional relationship, duration, associated symptoms, and relieving factors.

items.final_wording: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped exertional, radiation, syncope, breathlessness, diaphoresis, and abnormal-physiology concern prompts.

items.final_wording: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.evidence_paraphrase: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped clinician-selected ECG, chest imaging, and blood-test documentation.
